channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Tides of Tomorrow Release Date Countdown & Exact Start Times
item.content:encoded:
Major release dates continue to come thick and fast in 2026, and while April is perhaps not as big as May in this regard, Tides of Tomorrow’s launch is certainly one to keep an eye out for.

Tides of Tomorrow features a novel approach to storytelling, where you follow in the footsteps of your friends and other players, with their decisions and performances in the game impacting your journey.

If you’ve got your eyes cast toward Tides of Tomorrow and want to know exactly when it launches, Insider Gaming has all the details.

When is Tides of Tomorrow Coming Out? Release Date, Explained

Tides of Tomorrow has a confirmed release date of Wednesday, April 22, 2026, and there will be no delays to the launch date from THQ Nordic.

After releasing a demo last year, Tides of Tomorrow is now sailing headfirst into its launch date, where it will land on PC, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S.

  • More Insider Gaming: Escape from Tarkov Taking What’s Mine Guide—Where to Stash the CQCM Masks

With an affordable price compared to many other titles in the market, it could be a good option if you’re looking for something new to play while waiting for major releases next month, but the exact times you can jump in vary by region.

Tides of Tomorrow Release Times

Unlike many modern releases, Tides of Tomorrow has a global release structure and will be available to play at precisely the same moment worldwide.

That means players in the likes of New Zealand won’t be able to jump in ahead of others, instead giving those down under a longer wait. Depending on where you are located, the release date may actually be in the early hours of the morning on April 23.

  • More Insider Gaming: Best Pokémon Champions Replica Teams: All Codes & How to Use

In the United States, players will be able to play in mid-morning, while those in Europe will have to wait until early afternoon.

The table below shows the Tides of Tomorrow release time in major time zones worldwide, courtesy of PlayStation.

Are you excited for the release of Tides of Tomorrow? Share your thoughts in the Insider Gaming Discord.

Done reading? Now, take a look at the upcoming features and content in Crimson Desert, and check out details of Marathon’s huge development budget.

MOBILE APP

item.title: Windrose Early Access Release Date Countdown & Exact Start Times
item.content:encoded:
After such a successful demo, Windrose is ready to set sail into Early Access across the seven seas, and you’re invited on the journey. Embark on a huge adventure, where you and up to three friends can live out your perfect pirate lifestyle.

With a 70-hour campaign, over 30 islands to explore, and fully functional naval combat and building systems, Windrose is already a content-rich experience you won’t want to miss.

If you’re looking to dive into the Early Access, here’s when it’s due to release.

What Is The Windrose Early Access Release Date?

Windrose is sailing into Early Access on April 14, 2026, after an exciting reveal at the Triple I Initiative 2026 Showcase.

The demo was already incredibly popular, with over one million players wishlisting the game. Even if a small percentage of them decide to join Early Access, Windrose is due for another wave of successful player numbers—especially for an Early Access title.

  • More Insider Gaming: Does Windrose Have PvP?

Of course, you might be inclined to wait for the game’s full release, but based on the Steam page, it could be over two years away. So, if you enjoyed the demo and have been dying to give it ago, it looks like Early Access should have more than enough content to make it worth your while.

Windrose Early Access Release Times

The Windrose Crew are clearly anticipating a successful launch, as release times have already been shared, with the game set to drop at 1 AM PT on April 14, 2026.

  • More Insider Gaming: Triple-I Initiative Showcase 2026—Everything Announced

It’s an incredibly early start for those of you on the West Coast, but it might be more manageable for those of you elsewhere; with that in mind, here’s when you can hop into Windrose Early Access, regardless of where you are across the world:

Will you be setting sail during Windrose’s Early Access? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more Insider Gaming release hubs, check out the following:

  • Marvel Rivals Season 7.5
  • Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream
  • Pragmata

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

item.title: Crimson Desert Devs Reveal Upcoming Features and Content
item.content:encoded:
Pearl Abyss has revealed the upcoming features, content, and improvements that players can expect in Crimson Desert between April and June.

It has already been three weeks since Crimson Desert was released, and it has definitely made a mark in the community. What’s more, the main development team has already moved to Pearl Abyss’ next game, but the support for the current title will continue, as we have just been informed about everything new that’s coming.

New Content and Features Coming to Crimson Desert

Boss Rematches, Re-Blockading, New Difficulty Setting, and Combat-Focused Content

Starting with the new features coming to Crimson Desert, Boss Rematches is the first feature to be revealed, allowing players to replay battles with bosses that gave them a tough time. Then we have Re-blockading, where enemies will work to reclaim liberated locations. The third new feature is Difficulty settings, with players getting the option to choose between ‘easy, normal, and hard’ once it arrives. The devs are also working on “new combat-focused content”.

Character Play Improvements: New Skills, Hide Back Weapons, New Outfits

The developers have understood that Crimson Desert players want new skills for Damiane and Oongka that stand against the likes of “Force Palm” and “Axiom Force”, which is why both are receiving abilities that are “equivalent” to Kliff’s skills. The next option is to hide weapons from the character’s back. Lastly, players will receive new outfits for the characters, and “certain outfits that can only be sold or donated will be updated so that they can also be worn.”

Quality of Life Improvements and Life Features: Specialized Strage, New Mounts & Pets

Next up, we have a new specialized storage as part of the new Crimson Desert features. Food storage will be the area where you can store ingredients for cooking. Wardrobe will have all your headgear, armor, gloves, footwear, and cloaks. Gatherable storage will feature items used for tempering and crafting, including crafting materials, such as insects, stones, ores, and more. Lastly, Collection Storage will feature quest items, recipes, and other items found through exploration.

They have also listened to players’ requests to add more summonable mounts and new pets. Additionally, “dedicated armor for other mounts is also being planned.”

System and Graphics Improvements: UI, Controls, and More

The next set of Crimson Desert features extends to the UI, controls, and the quality of distant scenery. Players will receive a minimum font size option for better legibility, with other improvements and QoL features coming to the map, inventory, and housing. Players who have had issues with Crimson Desert controls will receive new customization options for certain controller inputs. The dev team will expand the range of configurable keys for keyboard and mouse to improve usability.

Lastly, the realism of distant backgrounds will be enhanced; however, that patch could be “somewhat larger” as it improves on how distant scenery changes and the quality of rendering under different conditions.

The upcoming Crimson Desert features and content were previewed on its website.

In other news, Pearl Abyss recently released the 1.02 patch for Crimson Desert, which adjusts storage, movement, outfit visibility, fast travel, and more. Additionally, an exclusive Crimson Desert skin is now available for Fortnite. What are your thoughts on the upcoming Crimson Desert features and content? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about the patch notes for the latest Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 Season 3 update. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

item.title: Today’s Contexto: Hints & Answer For April 10, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Contexto is a word association game that gives you a new word to guess every single day. With every attempt, the AI algorithm determines how close your guess is to the daily answer based on thematic and contextual similarity.

Sometimes, though, no matter how experienced you are, the word you’re looking for can be incredibly vague and hard to deduce. Luckily for you, this guide is full of hints to give you a helping hand, but make sure you give today’s Contexto a go if you haven’t already!

How To Play Contexto

Contexto is incredibly simple to play, but difficult to master. All you have to do is type words into the search bar, and the AI algorithm will tell you how close your word is to the answer.

You’ll know how close your guess is based on the colour of the bar and the number next to it.

  • Red includes guesses with the number 1,501 and above, meaning you’re way off from the secret word.
  • Orange includes guesses between 301 and 1,500, meaning you’re getting closer, but still some ways off.
  • Green includes guesses between 1 and 300, meaning you’re on the right track.

Best Contexto Tips & Tricks

  • Start off using broad terms, then narrow down once you’ve got under the 1,000 mark.
  • Try using Nouns first, and dip into verbs or adjectives once you’ve discovered the context.
  • Experiment with random words at times, especially as different forms of a root word can rank differently, such as work and worker.
  • Guess away, as unlike other word games like Wordle, you aren’t limited to a strict number of attempts.

Best Starting Words For Contexto

Here are some great starting words to get you going with Contexto:

  • Thing
  • Person
  • Place
  • Animal
  • Work
  • Nature
  • Game
  • Concept
  • Idea
  • Food

Contexto Hints For Today, April 10, 2026

Without giving away today’s Contexto answer, here are a few helpful hints to get you thinking in the right direction:

  • Hint 1: Facial expression
  • Hint 2: Joy
  • Hint 3: Sometimes creates dimples

If they don’t help, then here are the nine closest words, going from tenth to second:

  • Giggle
  • Face
  • Kiss
  • Beam
  • Laughter
  • Smirk
  • Eye
  • Laugh
  • Grin

Today’s Contexto Answer For April 10, 2026

If you’ve tried everything and still can’t figure out today’s Contexto answer, then you can find it down below:

Answer: Smile

A Smile is a happy or friendly expression on the face in which the ends of the mouth curve upwards slightly.

When Is The Next Contexto Game?

Contexto is updated daily at 12 AM or Midnight in your respective time zone, meaning the next game will start on April 11.

The Contexto schedule is very consistent, with a new game releasing at the same time every day.

How did you find today’s Contexto? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more word game guides, check out the following:

  • Wordle

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

item.title: Black Ops 7 Season 3 Patch Notes: April 9 Update Fixes Key Bugs
item.content:encoded:
Patch notes for the latest Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 Season 3 update. The patch was released on Thursday, April 9.

The latest update fixed several bugs, including an issue that unintentionally restricted the VS Recon in Ranked Play Search & Destroy.

Additionally, the update corrects an issue that unintentionally allowed the Stim Shot and other Tactical Equipment to recharge over time

Full Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 Patch Notes for April 9

Full patch notes can be found below:

GLOBAL

Camos

  • Addressed an issue that prevented the Genesis, Infestation, and Apocalypse Mastery Camos from animating when fired.

Operators  

  • Jurado
    • Addressed an issue where parts of the Summit skin would not be visible at longer distances.

Stability

  • Addressed an issue that impacted match performance when changing HUD settings. (Released on April 2nd.)

MULTIPLAYER

Maps  

  • Torque
    • Addressed an issue where players could spawn outside the playspace.
    • Addressed an issue where players could defuse the Demolition bomb site A through a wall.

Modes

  • Gun Game
    • Addressed an issue where there were 19 weapon tiers instead of 20.

Ranked Play

  • Restrictions
    • Addressed an issue that unintentionally restricted the VS Recon in Ranked Play Search & Destroy.

Scorestreaks 

  • Deadeye Drone
    • Addressed an issue that prevented the Deadeye Drone from taking damage as expected.
    • Reduced the Elimination Score from 100 to 35 when using the Extended Mag Overclock.

ZOMBIES

Maps 

  • Paradox Junction
    • Addressed an issue where using a LT53 Kazamir to teleport during the Boss Fight resulted in the player getting stuck.

Modes 

  • Dead Ops Arcade 4
    • Addressed an issue where players could only move the helicopter forward and backward.
  • Zombie Battle
    • Disabled the Equivalent Exchange Augment.

LTM Highlights / Adjustments 

  • Lost Outpost Event
    • Adjusted glow on Beacons from green to blue in order to better differentiate them from power-ups.
    • Addressed an issue where Beacons could drop outside of the playspace.

Equipment

  • Addressed an issue that unintentionally allowed the Stim Shot, and other Tactical Equipment, to recharge over time

Perk-a-Colas 

  • Mule Kick
    • Addressed an issue where Pack-a-Punch Tier and Rarity can be stripped from weapons when interacting with the Mystery Box, Wall Buys, Chompy, or dropping a weapon if Mule Kick is active
    • Addressed an issue where Mule Kick weapons could lose rarity and Pack-a-Punch, and disappear when loading a saved game.

Challenges 

  • MK35-ISR
    • Addressed an issue that prevented the Bloodstone camo from tracking correctly.
  • Weekly Challenges
    • Addressed an issue that prevented the Week 1 Weekly Challenge “Get 150 Kills using Pack-A-Punched Melee Weapons” from tracking properly. (Released on April 2nd.)
    • Addressed an issue that prevented the Week 1 Weekly Challenge “Use 15 Scorestreaks” from tracking properly. (Released on April 2nd.)

ENDGAME

Gameplay

  • Addressed an issue that prevented Endgame Restore Tokens from restoring lost progress. (Released April 2nd.)
  • Addressed an issue where Skill Tree and Combat Rating Levels could be mismatched.

Challenges

  • Addressed an issue with a Daily Challenge incorrectly listing Contracts to now list Assignments.

UI 

  • Lone Wolf Prestige Title
    • Addressed an issue where the Challenge requirements were incorrect.

How are you enjoying Call of Duty: Black Ops 7? Sound off in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter. 

MOBILE APP

Metal Gear Solid Movie Adaptation Officially Confirmed

A new report has confirmed that a Metal Gear Solid movie is officially in the works, with Final Destination: Bloodlines duo at the helm.

Far Far West Early Access has been announced during the Triple I Initiative, and it’s coming sooner than you might think.
